overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a waterfront promenade at dusk. The character moves from an open area with a parked van past industrial buildings and NPCs, ending with a view over the water toward a futuristic city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with parked vehicle

events.description: character walks past the black van and continues along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing a black van on the left while heading toward the city skyline

entered.detail: large black commercial van with white corporate lettering on the side
concrete balustrade separating the walkway from the water
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows against the dusk sky
tall industrial metal lattice tower structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide waterfront promenade at blue hour. A black corporate van sits parked on the left while the character walks forward along the concrete path. The futuristic city skyline rises in the distance across the water, with tall metal truss towers visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading dock area with storage containers

events.description: moves from open waterfront into enclosed industrial area alongside a large building
approaches a security guard standing near a garage door

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial building wall, passing shipping containers and equipment while approaching a garage entrance

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed near the garage door, observing the area

entered.detail: tall dark industrial building facade with minimal windows
stacked black crates and containers with corporate logos
large metal roll-up door with yellow and black hazard stripes on the ground
various machinery, barrels, and utility carts along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open promenade into a semi-enclosed industrial dock area. The space is lined with shipping containers and industrial equipment against a large building wall. A security guard stands near a garage door on the right as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with security checkpoint

events.description: passes a second security guard who is smoking near equipment

agents.ego_description: continuing along the industrial walkway, passing security personnel and various utility equipment

notable_agents.action: security guard leaning against equipment and smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: calm water surface reflecting the blue hour sky

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the narrow industrial corridor between the building wall and the waterfront railing. The area is dimly lit with artificial lights. After passing the first security guard, the character encounters a second guard smoking near equipment before the path begins to open up again to the water view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront viewing area with industrial pilings

events.description: exits the industrial corridor back into open waterfront space with panoramic water view

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the waterfront view, looking out over the water toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and domed structures visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the industrial corridor into an open waterfront area. The camera pans to take in the expansive view of the calm water and distant futuristic cityscape. Metal truss towers frame the view as the blue hour light creates a serene atmosphere over the harbor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront promenade that transitions from an open walkway into a confined industrial corridor before emerging back into a wide harbor vista. It begins on a concrete path at blue hour, passing a parked black corporate van with the futuristic city skyline and metal truss towers visible in the distance. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a semi-enclosed dock area lined with shipping containers and industrial equipment, where the camera passes a security guard stationed by a garage door. The path then narrows into a dimly lit corridor between a building wall and the waterfront railing, moving past a second smoking guard before the environment begins to open up again. Finally, the camera emerges from the industrial enclosure to reveal an expansive view of the calm water and the distant cityscape under a serene blue light.
